title: Food Paradise
desc: Chefs are finding cool ways to innovate on the grate; smoked Thanksgiving sandwich; barbecued brisket with Mexican flair; whole hog take on porchetta.

title: Sweet Empire: Winter Wars
desc: In a final showdown, host Wells Adams gives the bakers complete creative freedom to build an entire edible world that celebrates the holiday season; only one empire rises above the rest to claim the $50,000 prize and the crown of Sweet Empire.

title: Makeover by Monday
desc: In three days, Jenni Yolo helps a family turn their Victorian border house into a chic home where their kids can read, play and practise music, and she also gives them a bold entrance and library filled with rich colours and personalized art.

title: Makeover by Monday
desc: Jenni Yolo sets out to transform her younger sister's dark, duplex kitchen into a design masterpiece in only three days. Stepping outside her comfort zone in some areas, Jenni makes some bold design choices in hopes her sister will be blown away.

title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dubai
desc: Eve wants a dress that makes her feel like a Disney princess. Naomi has a tough time finding a dress that impresses her picky mother and mother-in-law.

title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dubai
desc: Bride-to-be, Eugenia brings her three sons along with her to the shop so they can help her choose the right dress. Plus, Claire hopes to find a bohemian style dress for her beach wedding.

title: Cake Boss
desc: Buddy makes the mermaid cake he's dreamed about; for an aquarium hosting `mermaids' who swim in the tanks for visitors. Plus, Mauro makes a law-abiding cake for a police pal.

desc: In their first challenge, each baker must create a holiday showpiece that represents how they celebrate at home. Judges Yolanda Gampp and Jacques Torres choose the top six bakers to become empire leaders.

desc: Jenni Yolo remodels her friends' bedroom into an oasis that will provide a nice escape for the parents of four children. Jenni uses DIY-friendly techniques to transform the space including a custom wallpaper and a faux-denza.

desc: It's been 20 seasons of making brides' wedding dress dreams come true. Randy and the Kleinfeld team encounter more mean mums, fashion-forward fathers and scene-stealing sisters, as well as some surprising Say Yes to the Dress firsts!

desc: Natalie, Racheal and Frankie help two growing boys move from a cluttered, shared bedroom into their own custom spaces; drawing inspiration from nature and the boys' artistic pursuits, they create serene bedrooms that reflect their personalities.

desc: Natalie, Racheal and Frankie reimagine a white-on-white kitchen and family room for a family of four; preserving the bones of each space, they bring in bold colour, original art and touches of glam to create a vibrant transformation.

desc: Four chefs bid in an auction before each round to determine their fourth ingredient, resulting in an unpredictable competition.

desc: Emerald tries to convince her wedding planner mum to let her double her dress budget, and singer Jillian looks to her dad for approval; plus, Elaina's back for her fitting with her sister, a diva with a capital D.

desc: Buddy turns up the heat with a fire-breathing dragon cake for a modern-day medieval knight. Plus, a cat café wants Mary to make a cake for a feline wedding - and to officiate it!

desc: Buddy meets a floral-loving bride who wants bouquets of flower cupcakes for her big day. Plus, Mauro celebrates his 25th wedding anniversary with Madeline in romantic style!

title: Makeover by Monday
desc: In three short days, Jenni Yolo rescues a living room overrun by kids' toys with dramatic design choices and creative storage solutions. Jenni also creates a custom fireplace for little money, and a thrifty shopping trip yields an amazing find.

title: Makeover by Monday
desc: After being isolated during most of the pandemic, a doctor and her wife are ready to entertain again; inspired by their love of wine and gardening, Jenni Yolo redesigns their kitchen to create a warm and inviting space.
